questions.question_text:
The table shows the distribution of heights (in cm) of students in a class.

$$ egin{array}{|l|c|c|c|c|c|}\hline 	ext{Heights (in cm)} & 125 - 129 & 130 - 134 & 135 - 139 & 140 - 144 & 145 - 149 \\hline 	ext{Number of students} & 5 & 21 & 23 & 7 & 4 \\hline \end{array}$$

(a) Draw a histogram for the distribution.
